description: Accounts of a grocer. In Arabic script. Recording what Abū l-Manṣūr al-Ḥaver purchased. The goods include eggplant, meat, turnip, leek, carrot, and garlic. Payments range from 1/4 dirham to 2 dirhams (for the meat). The other three pages of the bifolio contain Birkat ha-Mazon for weekdays.
description_he: רשימה או טבלה בערבית. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
